# Group 24/7 Worldwide (G247)

> Integrated creative and production studio. "Perfect design, flawless execution" across the full brand journey — from packaging on the shelf to campaigns on the screen. Two decades of production heritage (est. 2006), now AI-empowered. Senior-led, global team across Sydney, Manila, Bangkok and Shanghai. Strong in regulated industries (pharma, finance, insurance). Core promise of "True Value" — senior expertise at a cost larger agencies cannot match.

## Pages
- [Home](https://group247ww.com/): Studio overview, positioning, featured work, global team.
- [What We Do](https://group247ww.com/what-we-do): All five practices; why a single integrated studio.
- [How We Work](https://group247ww.com/how-we-work): Briefing, one workflow, approvals (incl. MLR/PromoMats), version control, QA, localisation, repeat-work improvements; procurement confidence.
- [Packaging](https://group247ww.com/packaging): Structural + graphic packaging, pharma compliance, premium finishes, multi-market rollout.
- [Point of Sale](https://group247ww.com/point-of-sale): POS displays, in-store signage, retail environments, vendor management.
- [Digital](https://group247ww.com/digital): GEO-first websites, microsites, performance, design systems, headless CMS, AI-assisted dev.
- [Advertising & Collateral](https://group247ww.com/advertising): Campaigns, print collateral, OOH, social, sales enablement, brand systems.
- [eDetailers](https://group247ww.com/edetailers): Veeva-ready pharma eDetailers, MLR/PromoMats approval, productised pricing tiers.
- [Selected Work](https://group247ww.com/work): Case study archive filterable by industry.
- [About](https://group247ww.com/about): Mission, vision, 2006→2026 heritage timeline, operating values, AI charter.
- [Team](https://group247ww.com/team): Senior-only team across four cities.
- [Insights](https://group247ww.com/insights): Articles on strategy, AI policy, GEO, pharma, global delivery, True Value.
- [Contact](https://group247ww.com/contact): Brief form, direct lines, office locations.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2006, Sydney.
- Offices: Sydney (HQ, strategy, account), Manila (production, engineering), Bangkok (production, artwork), Shanghai (local exec, translation).
- Practices: Packaging, Point of Sale, Digital, Advertising & Collateral, eDetailers.
- Differentiators: 20+ years of practice, 4 offices/one team, 12 languages delivered, ~40% faster than market via AI-assisted draft + senior review.
- eDetailer pricing: Standard from $14k/module, Launch from $34k/module, Global quoted (5+ markets).
